The comment could be a gentle reminder, but the use of "clearly" might suggest sarcasm. The absence of any obvious sarcastic markers like "lol" or "jk" makes me think it's more likely sincere. But sometimes in online comments, even without those, sarcasm can be present. prompt:
The following comment was posted in response to a parent comment on Reddit.

Parent comment: """In all honesty I've given up caring about loaned players. There are simply too many to keep tabs on. The only ones I will really be interested in are MVG and Bamford."""

Comment: """Clearly forgetting Marko Marin.."""

My read on this is that it's sincere, but curious what you think.
Is the comment sarcastic or sincere? Answer A for Sarcastic and B for Sincere. Answer nothing else.
